author: @docink6175
text: That came out awesome! You don't have to make an exact copy of the mandalorian's rifle or his pistol just like in reality weapons come in many shapes and sizes. I can picture a weathered and battered version of this hanging in a pawn shop somewhere in a galaxy unknown to mankind at this time

author: @danp1224
text: I use to make replica weapons from movies when I was young. I even made some condorman wings and jumped of the shed roof. That never turned out well for me. Apparently you can’t flap. Lol.

text:
